summary: Salesforce — bulk migration tool from legacy v1 connector
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want a bulk migration tool to seamlessly transfer Salesforce data from our legacy v1 connector to the new F-A1 Salesforce Connector, so that I can modernize our integration infrastructure without manual data re-entry or service disruption.

## Background

The legacy v1 connector lacks support for the new tenant architecture and cannot handle large datasets efficiently. Migrating existing Salesforce data sources to the new connector framework is critical for maintaining data freshness and enabling advanced PII auto-tagging capabilities.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. The migration tool provides a UI form where workspace-admin can select up to 10 legacy Salesforce data sources and initiate bulk export
2. Exported data includes all objects, field mappings, and transformation rules from the selected legacy connector configurations
3. The tool validates data integrity by comparing record counts and checksums between source and target before finalizing migration
4. A migration audit log is generated with timestamps, success/failure status per data source, and rollback instructions

comments.author: qa1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Tested with 50K records from staging Salesforce tenant — migration completed in 8 minutes with zero data loss. Audit log correctly captured all steps. Ready for release.
